mapper.select: /* 템플릿 상세 조회 */ SELECT A.TMPLAT_ID , A.TMPLAT_NM , A.TMPLAT_SE_CODE , A.TMPLAT_COURS , A.USE_AT , A.FRST_REGISTER_ID , A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM , B.USER_NM AS FRST_REGISTER_NM , C.CODE_NM AS TMPLAT_SE_CODE_NM , A.LAST_UPDUSR_ID , D.USER_NM AS LAST_UPDUSR_NM , A.LAST_UPDT_PNTTM FROM TB_TMPLAT_INFO A LEFT OUTER JOIN VW_USER_MASTER B ON A.FRST_REGISTER_ID = B.ESNTL_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CMMN_DETAIL_CODE C ON A.TMPLAT_SE_CODE = C.CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_EMPLYR_INFO D ON A.LAST_UPDUSR_ID = D.EMPLYR_ID WHERE C.CODE_ID = 'COM005' AND A.TMPLAT_ID = #{tmplatId}

/* 구분코드별 템플릿 목록 조회 */ SELECT A.TMPLAT_ID , A.TMPLAT_NM , A.TMPLAT_SE_CODE , A.TMPLAT_COURS , A.USE_AT , A.FRST_REGISTER_ID , A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM , B.USER_NM AS FRST_REGISTER_NM , C.CODE_NM AS TMPLAT_SE_CODE_NM FROM TB_TMPLAT_INFO A LEFT OUTER JOIN VW_USER_MASTER B ON A.FRST_REGISTER_ID = B.ESNTL_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CMMN_DETAIL_CODE C ON A.TMPLAT_SE_CODE = C.CODE WHERE C.CODE_ID = 'COM005' AND A.TMPLAT_SE_CODE = #{tmplatSeCode} ORDER BY A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM DESC
